concepts.label: Heart
concepts.definition: Muscular organ that pumps blood through the circulatory system

concepts.label: Brain
concepts.definition: Central organ of the nervous system that controls bodily functions and cognition

concepts.label: Lung
concepts.definition: Respiratory organ that facilitates gas exchange between air and blood

concepts.label: Liver
concepts.definition: Large organ that processes nutrients, detoxifies substances, and produces proteins

concepts.label: Kidney
concepts.definition: Organ that filters blood and removes waste products through urine formation

concepts.label: Stomach
concepts.definition: Digestive organ that breaks down food through acid and enzymes

concepts.label: Small Intestine
concepts.definition: Long tube where most nutrient absorption occurs during digestion

concepts.label: Large Intestine
concepts.definition: Final part of digestive tract that processes waste and absorbs water

concepts.label: Pancreas
concepts.definition: Organ that produces digestive enzymes and hormones like insulin

concepts.label: Spleen
concepts.definition: Organ that filters blood and supports immune system function

concepts.label: Gallbladder
concepts.definition: Small organ that stores and concentrates bile from the liver

concepts.label: Thyroid
concepts.definition: Endocrine gland that regulates metabolism through hormone production

concepts.label: Adrenal Gland
concepts.definition: Endocrine gland that produces stress hormones and regulates blood pressure

concepts.label: Pituitary Gland
concepts.definition: Master endocrine gland that controls other hormone-producing glands

concepts.label: Pineal Gland
concepts.definition: Small endocrine gland that produces melatonin and regulates sleep cycles

concepts.label: Parathyroid Gland
concepts.definition: Small glands that regulate calcium levels in the blood

concepts.label: Prostate
concepts.definition: Male reproductive gland that produces fluid component of semen

concepts.label: Ovary
concepts.definition: Female reproductive organ that produces eggs and sex hormones

concepts.label: Testis
concepts.definition: Male reproductive organ that produces sperm and testosterone

concepts.label: Uterus
concepts.definition: Female reproductive organ where fetal development occurs

concepts.label: Bladder
concepts.definition: Hollow organ that stores urine before elimination

concepts.label: Femur
concepts.definition: Longest and strongest bone in the human body, located in the thigh

concepts.label: Tibia
concepts.definition: Larger bone in the lower leg, also known as the shinbone

concepts.label: Fibula
concepts.definition: Smaller bone in the lower leg that provides stability

concepts.label: Humerus
concepts.definition: Long bone of the upper arm extending from shoulder to elbow

concepts.label: Radius
concepts.definition: Bone on the thumb side of the forearm

concepts.label: Ulna
concepts.definition: Bone on the pinky side of the forearm

concepts.label: Skull
concepts.definition: Bony structure that protects the brain and forms the head

concepts.label: Ribs
concepts.definition: Curved bones that form the rib cage and protect thoracic organs

concepts.label: Sternum
concepts.definition: Flat bone in the center of the chest that connects to ribs

concepts.label: Spine
concepts.definition: Column of vertebrae that protects the spinal cord

concepts.label: Pelvis
concepts.definition: Ring-like bone structure that supports the spine and protects pelvic organs

concepts.label: Scapula
concepts.definition: Triangular bone in the back of the shoulder, also called shoulder blade

concepts.label: Clavicle
concepts.definition: Bone that connects the arm to the body, also known as collarbone

concepts.label: Patella
concepts.definition: Triangular bone in front of the knee joint, also known as kneecap

concepts.label: Mandible
concepts.definition: Lower jaw bone that holds the lower teeth

concepts.label: Maxilla
concepts.definition: Upper jaw bone that forms part of the facial structure

concepts.label: Biceps
concepts.definition: Muscle on the front of the upper arm that flexes the elbow

concepts.label: Triceps
concepts.definition: Muscle on the back of the upper arm that extends the elbow

concepts.label: Quadriceps
concepts.definition: Group of four muscles on the front of the thigh that extend the knee

concepts.label: Hamstring
concepts.definition: Group of muscles on the back of the thigh that flex the knee

concepts.label: Gastrocnemius
concepts.definition: Large calf muscle that helps with walking and running

concepts.label: Deltoid
concepts.definition: Triangular muscle that covers the shoulder and moves the arm

concepts.label: Pectorals
concepts.definition: Chest muscles that help move the arms across the body

concepts.label: Latissimus Dorsi
concepts.definition: Large back muscle that pulls the arms toward the body

concepts.label: Trapezius
concepts.definition: Large muscle extending from the neck to the mid-back

concepts.label: Diaphragm
concepts.definition: Dome-shaped muscle that controls breathing

concepts.label: Abdominals
concepts.definition: Muscles of the abdominal wall that support the trunk

concepts.label: Gluteus Maximus
concepts.definition: Largest muscle in the buttocks that extends the hip

concepts.label: Knee Joint
concepts.definition: Complex joint connecting the thigh and lower leg bones

concepts.label: Hip Joint
concepts.definition: Ball-and-socket joint connecting the leg to the pelvis

concepts.label: Shoulder Joint
concepts.definition: Ball-and-socket joint with the greatest range of motion

concepts.label: Elbow Joint
concepts.definition: Hinge joint that allows bending and straightening of the arm

concepts.label: Ankle Joint
concepts.definition: Joint that connects the foot to the lower leg

concepts.label: Wrist Joint
concepts.definition: Complex joint connecting the hand to the forearm

concepts.label: Temporomandibular Joint
concepts.definition: Joint that connects the jaw to the skull

concepts.label: Spinal Joints
concepts.definition: Series of joints between vertebrae that allow spinal movement

concepts.label: Aorta
concepts.definition: Largest artery that carries oxygenated blood from the heart

concepts.label: Vena Cava
concepts.definition: Large vein that returns deoxygenated blood to the heart

concepts.label: Carotid Artery
concepts.definition: Major artery that supplies blood to the brain and head

concepts.label: Jugular Vein
concepts.definition: Large vein that drains blood from the head and neck

concepts.label: Pulmonary Artery
concepts.definition: Artery that carries deoxygenated blood from heart to lungs

concepts.label: Pulmonary Vein
concepts.definition: Vein that carries oxygenated blood from lungs to heart

concepts.label: Coronary Artery
concepts.definition: Artery that supplies blood to the heart muscle itself

concepts.label: Portal Vein
concepts.definition: Vein that carries blood from digestive organs to the liver

concepts.label: Renal Artery
concepts.definition: Artery that supplies blood to the kidneys

concepts.label: Renal Vein
concepts.definition: Vein that drains blood from the kidneys

concepts.label: Femoral Artery
concepts.definition: Large artery that supplies blood to the thigh and leg

concepts.label: Brachial Artery
concepts.definition: Main artery of the upper arm

concepts.label: Spinal Cord
concepts.definition: Bundle of nerves that connects the brain to the rest of the body

concepts.label: Optic Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that carries visual information from the eye to the brain

concepts.label: Auditory Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that carries hearing information from the ear to the brain

concepts.label: Sciatic Nerve
concepts.definition: Largest nerve in the body, running from lower back to foot

concepts.label: Vagus Nerve
concepts.definition: Long cranial nerve that controls many organ functions

concepts.label: Facial Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that controls facial expressions and taste

concepts.label: Trigeminal Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve responsible for facial sensation and chewing

concepts.label: Median Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that controls thumb movement and sensation

concepts.label: Ulnar Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that controls little finger movement and sensation

concepts.label: Radial Nerve
concepts.definition: Nerve that controls wrist and finger extension

concepts.label: Cancer
concepts.definition: Group of diseases characterized by abnormal cell growth and potential spread

concepts.label: Breast Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that forms in tissues of the breast

concepts.label: Lung Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that begins in the lungs

concepts.label: Prostate Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that occurs in the prostate gland

concepts.label: Colon Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer of the large intestine

concepts.label: Skin Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that forms in skin tissues

concepts.label: Leukemia
concepts.definition: Cancer of blood-forming tissues including bone marrow

concepts.label: Lymphoma
concepts.definition: Cancer that begins in cells of the lymph system

concepts.label: Brain Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that forms in brain tissue

concepts.label: Ovarian Cancer
concepts.definition: Cancer that begins in the ovaries

concepts.label: Diabetes
concepts.definition: Group of metabolic disorders characterized by high blood sugar

concepts.label: Type 1 Diabetes
concepts.definition: Autoimmune condition where the body cannot produce insulin

concepts.label: Type 2 Diabetes
concepts.definition: Condition where the body becomes resistant to insulin

concepts.label: Gestational Diabetes
concepts.definition: Diabetes that develops during pregnancy

concepts.label: Heart Attack
concepts.definition: Occurs when blood flow to part of the heart is blocked

concepts.label: Stroke
concepts.definition: Occurs when blood supply to part of the brain is interrupted

concepts.label: Ischemic Stroke
concepts.definition: Stroke caused by blocked blood flow to the brain

concepts.label: Hemorrhagic Stroke
concepts.definition: Stroke caused by bleeding in the brain

concepts.label: Hypertension
concepts.definition: Persistently elevated blood pressure

concepts.label: Hypotension
concepts.definition: Abnormally low blood pressure

concepts.label: Arrhythmia
concepts.definition: Irregular heartbeat or abnormal heart rhythm

concepts.label: Atrial Fibrillation
concepts.definition: Irregular and often rapid heart rhythm

concepts.label: Pneumonia
concepts.definition: Infection that inflames air sacs in lungs

concepts.label: Tuberculosis
concepts.definition: Infectious disease mainly affecting the lungs

concepts.label: Asthma
concepts.definition: Condition where airways narrow and swell producing extra mucus

concepts.label: COPD
concepts.definition: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease affecting breathing

concepts.label: Emphysema
concepts.definition: Condition where air sacs in lungs are damaged

concepts.label: Bronchitis
concepts.definition: Inflammation of the lining of bronchial tubes

concepts.label: Hepatitis
concepts.definition: Inflammation of the liver

concepts.label: Hepatitis A
concepts.definition: Viral infection causing liver inflammation

concepts.label: Hepatitis B
concepts.definition: Serious liver infection caused by hepatitis B virus

concepts.label: Hepatitis C
concepts.definition: Viral infection that causes liver inflammation

concepts.label: Cirrhosis
concepts.definition: Late stage scarring of the liver

concepts.label: Kidney Disease
concepts.definition: Condition where kidneys are damaged and cannot filter blood

concepts.label: Kidney Stones
concepts.definition: Hard deposits made of minerals and salts in kidneys

concepts.label: Urinary Tract Infection
concepts.definition: Infection in any part of the urinary system

concepts.label: Appendicitis
concepts.definition: Inflammation of the appendix

concepts.label: Gallstones
concepts.definition: Hard deposits that form in the gallbladder

concepts.label: Gastritis
concepts.definition: Inflammation of the stomach lining

concepts.label: Peptic Ulcer
concepts.definition: Open sore in the stomach or duodenum

concepts.label: Inflammatory Bowel Disease
concepts.definition: Chronic inflammation of the digestive tract

concepts.label: Crohn's Disease
concepts.definition: Type of inflammatory bowel disease

concepts.label: Ulcerative Colitis
concepts.definition: Inflammatory bowel disease affecting the colon

concepts.label: Arthritis
concepts.definition: Inflammation of one or more joints

concepts.label: Rheumatoid Arthritis
concepts.definition: Autoimmune disease affecting joints

concepts.label: Osteoarthritis
concepts.definition: Degenerative joint disease affecting cartilage

concepts.label: Osteoporosis
concepts.definition: Condition where bones become weak and brittle

concepts.label: Fibromyalgia
concepts.definition: Disorder characterized by widespread musculoskeletal pain

concepts.label: Multiple Sclerosis
concepts.definition: Disease where immune system attacks nerve coverings

concepts.label: Parkinson's Disease
concepts.definition: Progressive disorder affecting movement

concepts.label: Alzheimer's Disease
concepts.definition: Progressive brain disorder destroying memory and thinking skills

concepts.label: Depression
concepts.definition: Mental health disorder causing persistent sadness and loss of interest

concepts.label: Anxiety
concepts.definition: Mental health condition characterized by excessive worry

concepts.label: Bipolar Disorder
concepts.definition: Mental health condition causing extreme mood swings

concepts.label: Schizophrenia
concepts.definition: Mental disorder affecting thinking, perception, and behavior

concepts.label: PTSD
concepts.definition: Post-traumatic stress disorder following traumatic events

concepts.label: OCD
concepts.definition: Obsessive-compulsive disorder with recurring thoughts and behaviors

concepts.label: ADHD
concepts.definition: Attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder affecting focus and behavior

concepts.label: Autism Spectrum Disorder
concepts.definition: Neurodevelopmental condition affecting communication and behavior

concepts.label: Eating Disorders
concepts.definition: Serious conditions related to persistent eating behaviors

concepts.label: Anorexia Nervosa
concepts.definition: Eating disorder characterized by restricted food intake

concepts.label: Bulimia Nervosa
concepts.definition: Eating disorder with binge eating followed by compensatory behaviors

concepts.label: Antibiotics
concepts.definition: Medicines that fight bacterial infections

concepts.label: Penicillin
concepts.definition: First widely used antibiotic discovered from mold

concepts.label: Amoxicillin
concepts.definition: Broad-spectrum antibiotic used for various infections

concepts.label: Ciprofloxacin
concepts.definition: Fluoroquinolone antibiotic for serious bacterial infections

concepts.label: Metronidazole
concepts.definition: Antibiotic effective against anaerobic bacteria and parasites

concepts.label: Vancomycin
concepts.definition: Antibiotic used for serious gram-positive bacterial infections

concepts.label: Pain Relievers
concepts.definition: Medications that reduce or eliminate pain

concepts.label: Aspirin
concepts.definition: Pain reliever and anti-inflammatory medication

concepts.label: Ibuprofen
concepts.definition: Nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug for pain and fever

concepts.label: Acetaminophen
concepts.definition: Pain reliever and fever reducer

concepts.label: Morphine
concepts.definition: Strong opioid pain medication for severe pain

concepts.label: Codeine
concepts.definition: Mild opioid used for pain and cough suppression

concepts.label: Tramadol
concepts.definition: Synthetic opioid for moderate to severe pain

concepts.label: Vaccines
concepts.definition: Biological preparations that provide immunity to diseases

concepts.label: MMR Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine against measles, mumps, and rubella

concepts.label: Polio Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine that prevents poliomyelitis

concepts.label: Hepatitis B Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine that prevents hepatitis B infection

concepts.label: Influenza Vaccine
concepts.definition: Annual vaccine against seasonal flu strains

concepts.label: COVID-19 Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine against SARS-CoV-2 virus

concepts.label: HPV Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine against human papillomavirus

concepts.label: Tetanus Vaccine
concepts.definition: Vaccine that prevents tetanus bacterial infection

concepts.label: Hormones
concepts.definition: Chemical messengers that regulate body functions

concepts.label: Insulin
concepts.definition: Hormone that regulates blood glucose levels

concepts.label: Thyroid Hormones
concepts.definition: Hormones that regulate metabolism and growth

concepts.label: Growth Hormone
concepts.definition: Hormone that stimulates growth and cell reproduction

concepts.label: Cortisol
concepts.definition: Stress hormone produced by adrenal glands

concepts.label: Adrenaline
concepts.definition: Hormone released during stress or excitement

concepts.label: Testosterone
concepts.definition: Male sex hormone produced in testicles

concepts.label: Estrogen
concepts.definition: Female sex hormone produced in ovaries

concepts.label: Progesterone
concepts.definition: Hormone important for menstrual cycle and pregnancy

concepts.label: Melatonin
concepts.definition: Hormone that regulates sleep-wake cycles

concepts.label: Surgery
concepts.definition: Medical procedure involving manual or instrumental techniques

concepts.label: Appendectomy
concepts.definition: Surgical removal of the appendix

concepts.label: Cholecystectomy
concepts.definition: Surgical removal of the gallbladder

concepts.label: Coronary Bypass
concepts.definition: Surgery to improve blood flow to the heart

concepts.label: Hip Replacement
concepts.definition: Surgery to replace damaged hip joint

concepts.label: Knee Replacement
concepts.definition: Surgery to replace damaged knee joint

concepts.label: Cataract Surgery
concepts.definition: Surgery to remove clouded natural lens of eye

concepts.label: Hernia Repair
concepts.definition: Surgery to fix herniated tissue

concepts.label: Tonsillectomy
concepts.definition: Surgical removal of tonsils

concepts.label: Mastectomy
concepts.definition: Surgical removal of breast tissue

concepts.label: Prostatectomy
concepts.definition: Surgical removal of prostate gland

concepts.label: X-Ray
concepts.definition: Imaging technique using electromagnetic radiation

concepts.label: CT Scan
concepts.definition: Computed tomography using X-rays for detailed images

concepts.label: MRI
concepts.definition: Magnetic resonance imaging using magnetic fields

concepts.label: Ultrasound
concepts.definition: Imaging using high-frequency sound waves

concepts.label: PET Scan
concepts.definition: Positron emission tomography showing metabolic activity

concepts.label: Mammography
concepts.definition: X-ray examination of the breast

concepts.label: Endoscopy
concepts.definition: Procedure using flexible tube to view inside body

concepts.label: Colonoscopy
concepts.definition: Endoscopic examination of the colon

concepts.label: Biopsy
concepts.definition: Removal of tissue sample for examination

concepts.label: Blood Test
concepts.definition: Laboratory analysis of blood sample

concepts.label: Chemotherapy
concepts.definition: Treatment using drugs to destroy cancer cells

concepts.label: Radiation Therapy
concepts.definition: Treatment using high-energy rays to kill cancer cells

concepts.label: Immunotherapy
concepts.definition: Treatment that uses the body's immune system

concepts.label: Physical Therapy
concepts.definition: Treatment using exercises and manual techniques

concepts.label: Occupational Therapy
concepts.definition: Therapy to help people perform daily activities

concepts.label: Speech Therapy
concepts.definition: Treatment for speech and language disorders

concepts.label: Psychotherapy
concepts.definition: Treatment of mental disorders through talking

concepts.label: Dialysis
concepts.definition: Process of removing waste from blood when kidneys fail

concepts.label: Organ Transplant
concepts.definition: Surgical procedure replacing a failing organ

concepts.label: CPR
concepts.definition: Cardiopulmonary resuscitation for cardiac arrest

concepts.label: Heimlich Maneuver
concepts.definition: Emergency procedure for choking victims

concepts.label: First Aid
concepts.definition: Initial care given to someone who is injured

concepts.label: Defibrillation
concepts.definition: Electric shock to restore normal heart rhythm

concepts.label: Intubation
concepts.definition: Insertion of tube to maintain open airway

concepts.label: IV Therapy
concepts.definition: Administration of fluids directly into vein

concepts.label: Cell
concepts.definition: Basic structural and functional unit of life

concepts.label: Nucleus
concepts.definition: Control center of cell containing DNA

concepts.label: Mitochondria
concepts.definition: Organelles that produce energy for the cell

concepts.label: Ribosome
concepts.definition: Cellular structure that synthesizes proteins

concepts.label: Endoplasmic Reticulum
concepts.definition: Network of membranes involved in protein and lipid synthesis

concepts.label: Golgi Apparatus
concepts.definition: Organelle that processes and packages proteins

concepts.label: Lysosome
concepts.definition: Organelle containing digestive enzymes

concepts.label: Cytoplasm
concepts.definition: Gel-like substance filling the cell

concepts.label: Cell Membrane
concepts.definition: Barrier that controls what enters and leaves the cell

concepts.label: Cell Wall
concepts.definition: Rigid structure surrounding plant cells

concepts.label: DNA
concepts.definition: Deoxyribonucleic acid carrying genetic information

concepts.label: RNA
concepts.definition: Ribonucleic acid involved in protein synthesis

concepts.label: Chromosome
concepts.definition: Structure containing DNA and proteins in cell nucleus

concepts.label: Gene
concepts.definition: Unit of heredity made of DNA

concepts.label: Genome
concepts.definition: Complete set of genetic information in an organism

concepts.label: Protein
concepts.definition: Large molecule made of amino acids performing various functions

concepts.label: Amino Acid
concepts.definition: Building block of proteins

concepts.label: Enzyme
concepts.definition: Protein that catalyzes biochemical reactions

concepts.label: ATP
concepts.definition: Adenosine triphosphate, the energy currency of cells

concepts.label: Photosynthesis
concepts.definition: Process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy

concepts.label: Cellular Respiration
concepts.definition: Process of breaking down glucose to produce ATP

concepts.label: Mitosis
concepts.definition: Cell division resulting in two identical daughter cells

concepts.label: Meiosis
concepts.definition: Cell division producing gametes with half the chromosomes

concepts.label: Evolution
concepts.definition: Change in heritable traits of biological populations over time

concepts.label: Natural Selection
concepts.definition: Mechanism of evolution where organisms with favorable traits survive

concepts.label: Mutation
concepts.definition: Change in DNA sequence that can be inherited

concepts.label: Adaptation
concepts.definition: Trait that enhances survival in specific environment

concepts.label: Ecosystem
concepts.definition: Community of organisms interacting with their environment

concepts.label: Food Chain
concepts.definition: Linear sequence of organisms showing energy flow

concepts.label: Food Web
concepts.definition: Complex network of interconnected food chains

concepts.label: Producer
concepts.definition: Organism that makes its own food through photosynthesis

concepts.label: Primary Consumer
concepts.definition: Organism that eats producers

concepts.label: Secondary Consumer
concepts.definition: Organism that eats primary consumers

concepts.label: Decomposer
concepts.definition: Organism that breaks down dead organic matter

concepts.label: Symbiosis
concepts.definition: Close long-term biological interaction between species

concepts.label: Mutualism
concepts.definition: Symbiotic relationship benefiting both organisms

concepts.label: Parasitism
concepts.definition: Symbiotic relationship where one benefits and other is harmed

concepts.label: Commensalism
concepts.definition: Symbiotic relationship where one benefits and other is unaffected

concepts.label: Biodiversity
concepts.definition: Variety of life in ecosystems

concepts.label: Species
concepts.definition: Group of organisms that can reproduce with fertile offspring

concepts.label: Population
concepts.definition: Group of organisms of same species in same area

concepts.label: Community
concepts.definition: All populations of different species in same area

concepts.label: Habitat
concepts.definition: Natural environment where organism lives

concepts.label: Niche
concepts.definition: Role and position organism has in its environment

concepts.label: Bacteria
concepts.definition: Single-celled prokaryotic microorganisms

concepts.label: Virus
concepts.definition: Infectious agent requiring host cell to reproduce

concepts.label: Fungi
concepts.definition: Eukaryotic organisms including yeasts, molds, and mushrooms

concepts.label: Prokaryote
concepts.definition: Organism lacking membrane-bound nucleus

concepts.label: Eukaryote
concepts.definition: Organism with membrane-bound nucleus

concepts.label: Pathogen
concepts.definition: Disease-causing microorganism

concepts.label: Antibiotic Resistance
concepts.definition: Ability of bacteria to survive antibiotic treatment

concepts.label: Immune System
concepts.definition: Body's defense mechanism against pathogens

concepts.label: White Blood Cell
concepts.definition: Immune cell that fights infections

concepts.label: Antibody
concepts.definition: Protein produced by immune system to neutralize antigens

concepts.label: Antigen
concepts.definition: Substance that triggers immune response

concepts.label: T Cell
concepts.definition: Type of white blood cell central to adaptive immunity

concepts.label: B Cell
concepts.definition: Type of white blood cell that produces antibodies

concepts.label: Lymph Node
concepts.definition: Small structure filtering lymph and containing immune cells

concepts.label: Bone Marrow
concepts.definition: Tissue inside bones where blood cells are produced

concepts.label: Thymus
concepts.definition: Organ where T cells mature

concepts.label: Vaccination
concepts.definition: Administration of vaccine to stimulate immunity

concepts.label: Immunity
concepts.definition: Resistance to particular disease

concepts.label: Inflammation
concepts.definition: Immune response to injury or infection

concepts.label: Allergen
concepts.definition: Substance causing allergic reaction

concepts.label: Autoimmune Disease
concepts.definition: Condition where immune system attacks body's own tissues

concepts.label: Calorie
concepts.definition: Unit of energy from food

concepts.label: Metabolism
concepts.definition: Chemical processes maintaining life

concepts.label: Basal Metabolic Rate
concepts.definition: Energy required for basic body functions at rest

concepts.label: Carbohydrates
concepts.definition: Macronutrient providing energy for body

concepts.label: Proteins
concepts.definition: Macronutrient essential for growth and repair

concepts.label: Fats
concepts.definition: Macronutrient providing energy and essential fatty acids

concepts.label: Vitamins
concepts.definition: Micronutrients essential for normal metabolism

concepts.label: Vitamin A
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin important for vision and immune function

concepts.label: Vitamin B12
concepts.definition: Water-soluble vitamin essential for nerve function

concepts.label: Vitamin C
concepts.definition: Water-soluble vitamin important for immune system

concepts.label: Vitamin D
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin important for bone health

concepts.label: Vitamin E
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin acting as antioxidant

concepts.label: Vitamin K
concepts.definition: Fat-soluble vitamin essential for blood clotting

concepts.label: Folate
concepts.definition: B vitamin important for DNA synthesis

concepts.label: Minerals
concepts.definition: Inorganic substances essential for body functions

concepts.label: Calcium
concepts.definition: Mineral essential for bone and tooth structure

concepts.label: Iron
concepts.definition: Mineral essential for oxygen transport in blood

concepts.label: Zinc
concepts.definition: Mineral important for immune function and wound healing

concepts.label: Magnesium
concepts.definition: Mineral involved in over 300 enzyme reactions

concepts.label: Potassium
concepts.definition: Mineral important for heart function and blood pressure

concepts.label: Sodium
concepts.definition: Mineral that helps maintain fluid balance

concepts.label: Phosphorus
concepts.definition: Mineral important for bone formation and energy storage

concepts.label: Iodine
concepts.definition: Mineral essential for thyroid hormone production

concepts.label: Fiber
concepts.definition: Indigestible plant material important for digestive health

concepts.label: Antioxidants
concepts.definition: Compounds that protect cells from oxidative damage

concepts.label: Cholesterol
concepts.definition: Waxy substance important for cell membranes

concepts.label: Omega-3 Fatty Acids
concepts.definition: Essential fatty acids important for brain and heart health

concepts.label: Glycemic Index
concepts.definition: Measure of how quickly foods raise blood sugar

concepts.label: Malnutrition
concepts.definition: Condition caused by inadequate or unbalanced nutrition

concepts.label: Obesity
concepts.definition: Condition characterized by excessive body fat

concepts.label: BMI
concepts.definition: Body Mass Index measuring body fat based on height and weight

concepts.label: Mammals
concepts.definition: Warm-blooded vertebrates with hair and milk production

concepts.label: Birds
concepts.definition: Warm-blooded vertebrates with feathers and wings

concepts.label: Reptiles
concepts.definition: Cold-blooded vertebrates with scales

concepts.label: Amphibians
concepts.definition: Cold-blooded vertebrates living both on land and in water

concepts.label: Fish
concepts.definition: Cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates with gills

concepts.label: Insects
concepts.definition: Six-legged arthropods with three body segments

concepts.label: Arachnids
concepts.definition: Eight-legged arthropods including spiders and scorpions

concepts.label: Crustaceans
concepts.definition: Arthropods with hard shells including crabs and lobsters

concepts.label: Mollusks
concepts.definition: Soft-bodied animals often with shells

concepts.label: Cnidarians
concepts.definition: Animals with stinging cells including jellyfish

concepts.label: Vertebrates
concepts.definition: Animals with backbone or spinal column

concepts.label: Invertebrates
concepts.definition: Animals without backbone

concepts.label: Primates
concepts.definition: Order of mammals including humans, apes, and monkeys

concepts.label: Carnivores
concepts.definition: Animals that primarily eat meat

concepts.label: Herbivores
concepts.definition: Animals that primarily eat plants

concepts.label: Omnivores
concepts.definition: Animals that eat both plants and meat

concepts.label: Migration
concepts.definition: Seasonal movement of animals between habitats

concepts.label: Hibernation
concepts.definition: State of inactivity during cold months

concepts.label: Camouflage
concepts.definition: Ability to blend in with surroundings

concepts.label: Metamorphosis
concepts.definition: Process of transformation from juvenile to adult form

concepts.definition: Study of body responses to exercise

concepts.label: Kinesiology
concepts.definition: Study of human body movement

concepts.label: Biomechanics
concepts.definition: Study of mechanical aspects of movement

concepts.label: Gait Analysis
concepts.definition: Study of walking patterns

concepts.label: Posture
concepts.definition: Position in which body is held

concepts.label: Ergonomics
concepts.definition: Design of workplace to fit human body

concepts.label: Repetitive Strain Injury
concepts.definition: Injury from repeated motions

concepts.label: Workplace Safety
concepts.definition: Measures preventing injury at work

concepts.label: Personal Protective Equipment
concepts.definition: Gear protecting from workplace hazards

concepts.label: Occupational Health
concepts.definition: Health and safety in workplace

concepts.label: Industrial Hygiene
concepts.definition: Prevention of workplace health hazards

concepts.label: Environmental Health
concepts.definition: Health effects of environmental factors

concepts.label: Air Pollution
concepts.definition: Contamination of air with harmful substances

concepts.label: Water Pollution
concepts.definition: Contamination of water sources

concepts.label: Radiation Exposure
concepts.definition: Contact with ionizing radiation

concepts.label: Chemical Exposure
concepts.definition: Contact with toxic chemicals

concepts.label: Noise Pollution
concepts.definition: Harmful levels of environmental noise

concepts.label: Heat Exhaustion
concepts.definition: Illness from excessive heat exposure

concepts.label: Heat Stroke
concepts.definition: Life-threatening overheating of body

concepts.label: Hypothermia
concepts.definition: Dangerously low body temperature

concepts.label: Frostbite
concepts.definition: Freezing of body tissues

concepts.label: Altitude Sickness
concepts.definition: Illness from reduced oxygen at high altitude

concepts.label: Decompression Sickness
concepts.definition: Illness from rapid pressure changes

concepts.label: Carbon Monoxide Poisoning
concepts.definition: Toxic effects of carbon monoxide gas

concepts.label: Lead Poisoning
concepts.definition: Toxic effects of lead exposure

concepts.label: Mercury Poisoning
concepts.definition: Toxic effects of mercury exposure

concepts.label: Food Poisoning
concepts.definition: Illness from contaminated food

concepts.label: Salmonella
concepts.definition: Bacteria causing food poisoning

concepts.label: E. coli
concepts.definition: Bacteria potentially causing severe illness

concepts.label: Listeria
concepts.definition: Bacteria dangerous to pregnant women

concepts.label: Campylobacter
concepts.definition: Common cause of bacterial food poisoning

concepts.label: Botulism
concepts.definition: Severe poisoning from Clostridium botulinum

concepts.label: Norovirus
concepts.definition: Virus causing stomach flu

concepts.label: Rotavirus
concepts.definition: Virus causing severe diarrhea in children

concepts.label: Hepatitis A
concepts.definition: Viral liver infection from contaminated food

concepts.label: Food Safety
concepts.definition: Practices preventing food-borne illness

concepts.label: Food Hygiene
concepts.definition: Cleanliness in food handling

concepts.label: Cross Contamination
concepts.definition: Transfer of harmful bacteria between foods

concepts.label: Temperature Control
concepts.definition: Maintaining proper food storage temperatures

concepts.label: Pasteurization
concepts.definition: Heat treatment killing harmful microorganisms

concepts.label: Sterilization
concepts.definition: Process eliminating all microorganisms

concepts.label: Disinfection
concepts.definition: Process killing disease-causing microorganisms

concepts.label: Antiseptic
concepts.definition: Substance preventing infection in living tissue

concepts.label: Antibiotic Resistance
concepts.definition: Bacteria's ability to survive antibiotic treatment

concepts.label: MRSA
concepts.definition: Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus

concepts.label: VRE
concepts.definition: Vancomycin-resistant Enterococcus

concepts.label: C. diff
concepts.definition: Clostridioides difficile causing severe diarrhea

concepts.label: Nosocomial Infection
concepts.definition: Hospital-acquired infection

concepts.label: Hand Hygiene
concepts.definition: Cleaning hands to prevent infection spread

concepts.label: Personal Protective Equipment
concepts.definition: Equipment protecting healthcare workers

concepts.label: Isolation Precautions
concepts.definition: Measures preventing disease transmission

concepts.label: Quarantine
concepts.definition: Separation of potentially infected individuals

concepts.label: Contact Tracing
concepts.definition: Identifying people exposed to infectious disease

concepts.label: Herd Immunity
concepts.definition: Community protection when most are immune

concepts.label: Epidemic
concepts.definition: Disease outbreak affecting many people

concepts.label: Pandemic
concepts.definition: Global disease outbreak

concepts.label: Endemic
concepts.definition: Disease constantly present in population

concepts.label: Incubation Period
concepts.definition: Time between infection and symptoms

concepts.label: Infectious Period
concepts.definition: Time when person can spread disease

concepts.label: Vector
concepts.definition: Organism transmitting disease between hosts

concepts.label: Reservoir
concepts.definition: Natural habitat where pathogen lives

concepts.label: Zoonosis
concepts.definition: Disease transmissible from animals to humans
